about.title: More than a haircut
about.body: THE BARBER KING is built on three pillars: precise craftsmanship, genuine respect for every client, and an appointment system that actually works — no waiting, no chaos. Our chairs have welcomed locals and travellers from across Bulgaria and from many corners of the world. Some clients have been with us since day one. Our goal is simple: everyone leaves looking exactly how they imagined, and looking forward to coming back.

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: Choose one service — or stack them for the full treatment.
services.note: Prices coming soon. Contact us for current rates.

items.name: Haircut
items.desc: Classic or contemporary cut with scissors or clippers, tailored to your face shape and style.

items.name: Beard Trim & Shape
items.desc: Precise beard shaping and styling with razor and scissors for a clean, defined look.

items.name: Hair + Beard Combo
items.desc: The full package — haircut and beard shaping in a single session.

items.name: Shape-Up / Edges
items.desc: Clean-up of your hairline — neck, temples, and forehead for sharp, crisp edges.

items.name: Eyebrow Trim
items.desc: Neat, precise eyebrow grooming for a polished, finished appearance.

items.name: Razor Clean Shave
items.desc: Traditional hot-towel straight-razor shave for an impossibly smooth finish.

items.name: Hair Colouring
items.desc: Full colour or root retouch with professional products for a natural-looking result.

items.name: Shampoo & Styling
items.desc: Deep cleansing shampoo followed by blow-dry and styling to your preference.

items.name: Kids' Haircut
items.desc: Patient, gentle haircuts for children in a calm, welcoming environment.

barbers.title: Meet the barbers
barbers.subtitle: Every barber has their own style and specialty. Pick your favourite.

items.name: Ilker
items.desc: A craftsman with an eye for detail. Ilker specialises in timeless men's cuts and razor-sharp contours that speak for themselves.

items.name: Emran
items.desc: Fast without sacrificing a single millimetre. Clients return specifically for his precise technique and immaculate beard shaping.

items.name: Toni
items.desc: Always on top of what's current — Toni recreates modern styles with confidence and an effortless touch.

items.name: Borko
items.desc: The go-to for a traditional hot-towel shave and clean, classic beard work done the right way.

gallery.title: Our work
gallery.subtitle: Every cut tells a story. Here's ours.

items.name: Ivan I.
items.text: I've been coming to The Barber King for over four years and I have no plans to stop. The guys know exactly what they're doing — hygiene is perfect, the attitude is warm, and the result is always exactly what I wanted. There's always parking nearby too, which is a huge plus.

items.name: Petar P.
items.text: Exceptional professionalism from start to finish. When it comes to the price-to-quality ratio — there's simply nothing to add. The level of care and attention is rare.

items.name: Kristiyan F.
items.text: The best barbers in Varna. Emran works incredibly fast and precisely — no mistakes, no compromises. I come regularly and the cut is perfect every single time. Highly recommend!

items.name: Anton V.
items.text: Booked a slot online and was seen right on time — not a minute of waiting. I rarely see that level of organisation in a barbershop. The quality of the work matched the experience perfectly.

items.name: Rohan S.
items.text: I was visiting Varna for a week and asked a local where to get a proper haircut. They sent me here — and I'm glad they did. Easily the best haircut I got during the entire trip. The barbers are skilled, attentive, and the atmosphere is exactly right.

items.name: Viktor N.
items.text: I've been coming here since they first opened. The shop has grown, but the spirit is the same — attention to every client, quality without compromise. Coming here always feels like visiting old friends.

booking.title: Book your appointment
booking.subtitle: Choose your service, barber, and a time that works for you.

step1.title: What would you like?
step1.subtitle: You can select more than one service.

step2.title: Choose a barber
step2.subtitle: Or let us assign the next available.
step2.no_preference_desc: We'll assign you to the next available barber.

step3.title: When suits you?
step3.subtitle: Choose a date and available time slot.
step3.no_slots: No available slots for this date.

step4.title: Your details
step4.subtitle: So we can confirm your booking.
step4.name: Your name *
step4.phone_error: Please enter a valid Bulgarian mobile number.

success.title: Booking received!
success.body: We'll be in touch shortly to confirm. Or message us directly on WhatsApp for an instant reply.

location.title: Find us
location.address: 72 Doctor Piskyuliev St, Hristo Botev / Odesos, 9000 Varna
location.landmark: Inside the Kolhozen Pazar market complex — parking is directly at the entrance.

footer.gdpr: Information shared during booking is stored solely for appointment confirmation and is never shared with third parties.
